note: Real high-frequency SportVU tracking for the nba-rl-sim demo possessions, re-derived from the raw .7z logs — FULL-COURT RAW coordinates (the reflect+clip of normalize_to_half_court is NOT applied). players[] are 10 entities in NETWORK order [BH, tm1..4, def1..5], [x,y] in RAW SportVU feet (x in [0,94], baskets at (5.25,25) LEFT and (88.75,25) RIGHT; y in [0,50]). Offense attacks per attacking_right (True => the RIGHT basket at x=88.75). ball is [x,y,z] (z for shot-arc rendering). Frame order, count, t/sc/gc/q and decision_snap_indices are IDENTICAL to tracking_*.json (same possessions, same frames) — ONLY the coordinate frame differs (raw full-court vs half-court folded). The agent's features are derived on the client by folding these raw coords back to the basket-right half-court frame; in the frontcourt that fold is clip-free and reproduces the half-court export exactly.
court_frame: full court raw SportVU; x in [0,94] baskets (5.25,25) & (88.75,25); y in [0,50]; orientation per attacking_right
